minerType.name: XelisV3
minerType.description: (Python Needed, TNN miner made by Tritton 2.5% fee)
minerType.installScript:
import os, time, subprocess, tempfile
from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor, as_completed

ADB = os.environ.get("adb_path", "adb")
devices = os.environ.get("devices", "").split()

install_script_content = r'''#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
set -e

echo "[*] Updating Termux packages..."
yes '' | pkg upgrade -y || true
pkg update -y || true

echo "[*] Installing proot-distro..."
pkg install proot-distro wget -y

echo "[*] Installing Ubuntu in proot-distro..."
proot-distro install ubuntu || echo "[*] Ubuntu may already be installed, continuing..."

echo "[*] Setting up XelisV3 TNN Miner inside Ubuntu proot..."
proot-distro login ubuntu -- bash -c '
set -e
echo "[*] Updating Ubuntu packages..."
apt update -y && apt upgrade -y || true
apt install wget -y || true

echo "[*] Downloading TNN Miner v0.6.8..."
cd ~
if [ -f "Tnn-miner-arm64-v0.6.8.tar.gz" ]; then
    echo "[*] Archive already exists, removing old version..."
    rm -f Tnn-miner-arm64-v0.6.8.tar.gz
fi
wget https://gitlab.com/Tritonn204/tnn-miner/-/releases/v0.6.8/downloads/Tnn-miner-arm64-v0.6.8.tar.gz

echo "[*] Extracting TNN Miner..."
tar -xvf Tnn-miner-arm64-v0.6.8.tar.gz

echo "[*] Cleaning up archive..."
rm -f Tnn-miner-arm64-v0.6.8.tar.gz

echo "[*] Setting permissions..."
chmod +x ~/tnn-miner* 2>/dev/null || true

echo "[OK] XelisV3 TNN Miner v0.6.8 installation complete!"
ls -la ~/ | grep -i tnn || echo "Miner files extracted to home directory"
'

echo "[OK] XelisV3 installation complete!"
'''

def install_on_device(device_id, script_path):
    try:
        print(f"[{device_id}] Starting XelisV3 installation...")
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell am force-stop com.termux", shell=True)
        time.sleep(1)

        device_temp_path = "/data/local/tmp/xelisv3_install.sh"
        print(f"[{device_id}] Pushing install script...")
        subprocess.run(f'{ADB} -s {device_id} push "{script_path}" "{device_temp_path}"', shell=True, check=True)

        print(f"[{device_id}] chmod +x ...")
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell chmod 755 {device_temp_path}", shell=True, check=True)

        print(f"[{device_id}] Launching Termux and waiting for initialization...")
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell am start -n com.termux/com.termux.app.TermuxActivity", shell=True)
        time.sleep(10)  # Wait 10 seconds for Termux to fully load

        # Use %s to send a space with "adb shell input text"
        adb_typed_cmd = "bash%s/data/local/tmp/xelisv3_install.sh"
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input text \"{adb_typed_cmd}\"", shell=True)
        time.sleep(1)
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input keyevent 66", shell=True)

        print(f"[{device_id}] Install process started successfully!")
        return f"[{device_id}] Success"

    except Exception as e:
        print(f"[{device_id}] Error: {e}")
        return f"[{device_id}] Error: {e}"

# Write the script with UTF-8 + LF to avoid cp1252/CRLF issues
with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode='w', encoding='utf-8', newline='\n', delete=False, suffix='.sh') as f:
    f.write(install_script_content)
    local_script_path = f.name

if not devices:
    print("No devices in $devices")
else:
    print(f"Saved installation script to {local_script_path}")
    print("=== Starting XelisV3 TNN Miner Installation (Parallel) ===")
    max_workers = max(1, len(devices))
    with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=max_workers) as executor:
        future_to_device = {executor.submit(install_on_device, d, local_script_path): d for d in devices}
        for future in as_completed(future_to_device):
            device_id = future_to_device[future]
            try:
                result = future.result()
                print(result)
            except Exception as exc:
                print(f"[{device_id}] Generated an exception: {exc}")

    os.unlink(local_script_path)
    print("Installation commands sent to all devices. proot-distro + TNN Miner setup may take several minutes.")
minerType.runScript:
import os, time, json, subprocess
from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor, as_completed

ADB = os.environ.get("adb_path", "adb")
devices = os.environ.get("devices", "").split()
wallet_address = os.environ.get("wallet_address", "")
pool_url = os.environ.get("pool_url", "")
threads = os.environ.get("threads", "8")
algorithm = os.environ.get("algorithm", "--xel-v3")
password = os.environ.get("password", "")
additional_flags = os.environ.get("additional_flags", "")
worker_names_raw = os.environ.get("worker_names_json", "")
worker_names = json.loads(worker_names_raw) if worker_names_raw else {}

def run_mining_on_device(device_id):
    """Start XelisV3 TNN mining on a single device"""
    try:
        print(f"[{device_id}] Starting XelisV3 TNN mining...")

        # Resolve worker name: worker_names map > password fallback > device_id
        worker_name = worker_names.get(device_id, password) or device_id

        # Construct the mining command for TNN miner
        mining_cmd = f"./tnn-miner-cpu {algorithm} --wallet {wallet_address} --worker-name {worker_name} --daemon-address {pool_url} --threads {threads}"

        if additional_flags:
            mining_cmd += f" {additional_flags}"

        print(f"[{device_id}] Mining command: {mining_cmd}")

        print(f"[{device_id}] Force stopping Termux...")
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell am force-stop com.termux", shell=True)
        time.sleep(2)

        print(f"[{device_id}] Launching Termux...")
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell am start -n com.termux/com.termux.app.TermuxActivity", shell=True)
        time.sleep(10)

        print(f"[{device_id}] Entering proot-distro Ubuntu...")
        proot_cmd = "proot-distro%slogin%subuntu"
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input text \"{proot_cmd}\"", shell=True)
        time.sleep(1)
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input keyevent 66", shell=True)
        time.sleep(8)

        print(f"[{device_id}] Running TNN miner...")
        escaped_cmd = mining_cmd.replace(" ", "%s")
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input text \"{escaped_cmd}\"", shell=True)
        time.sleep(1)
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input keyevent 66", shell=True)

        print(f"[{device_id}] Keeping device screen on...")
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell svc power stayon true", shell=True)

        print(f"[{device_id}] XelisV3 TNN mining initiated successfully!")
        return f"[{device_id}] Mining started"

    except Exception as e:
        print(f"[{device_id}] Error starting mining: {e}")
        return f"[{device_id}] Error: {e}"

print("=== Starting XelisV3 TNN Mining (Parallel) ===")

if not devices:
    print("No devices specified in $devices environment variable")
elif not wallet_address:
    print("No wallet address specified in $wallet_address environment variable")
elif not pool_url:
    print("No pool URL specified in $pool_url environment variable")
elif not pool_url.startswith("stratum+tcp://"):
    print("Pool URL must include stratum+tcp:// prefix (e.g., stratum+tcp://ca.xelis.herominers.com:1225)")
else:
    with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=len(devices)) as executor:
        future_to_device = {executor.submit(run_mining_on_device, device_id): device_id for device_id in devices}
        for future in as_completed(future_to_device):
            device_id = future_to_device[future]
            try:
                result = future.result()
                print(result)
            except Exception as exc:
                print(f"[{device_id}] Generated an exception: {exc}")

    print("XelisV3 TNN mining started on all devices. Check the devices to see the progress.")
minerType.stopScript:
import os, time, subprocess
from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor, as_completed

ADB = os.environ.get("adb_path", "adb")
devices = os.environ.get("devices", "").split()

def stop_mining_on_device(device_id):
    """Stop XelisV3 TNN mining on a single device"""
    try:
        print(f"[{device_id}] Stopping XelisV3 TNN mining...")
        
        print(f"[{device_id}] Attempting to stop miner process using Termux...")
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell am start -n com.termux/com.termux.app.TermuxActivity", shell=True)
        time.sleep(2)
        
        # Send Ctrl+C to stop any running process (keyevent 67 doesn't work, use input keyevent for Ctrl+C)
        print(f"[{device_id}] Sending interrupt signal (Ctrl+C)...")
        # Send multiple Ctrl+C to ensure it stops
        for _ in range(3):
            subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input keyevent 67", shell=True)  # Backspace first to clear
            time.sleep(0.5)
        
        # Try sending actual Ctrl+C character
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input text '\\x03'", shell=True)
        time.sleep(1)
        
        # Kill tnn-miner processes via Termux input
        pkill_cmd = "pkill%s-f%stnn-miner"
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input text \"{pkill_cmd}\"", shell=True)
        time.sleep(1)
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input keyevent 66", shell=True)
        time.sleep(1)
        
        print(f"[{device_id}] Attempting to force-kill miner process directly...")
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell pkill -f tnn-miner", shell=True)
        time.sleep(1)
        
        # Also try killing proot processes which would stop the miner inside
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell pkill -f proot", shell=True)
        time.sleep(1)
        
        print(f"[{device_id}] Force stopping Termux application as a last resort...")
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell am force-stop com.termux", shell=True)
        
        print(f"[{device_id}] Turning device screen off...")
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell svc power stayon false", shell=True)
        
        print(f"[{device_id}] XelisV3 TNN mining stopped successfully!")
        return f"[{device_id}] Mining stopped"
        
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"[{device_id}] Error stopping mining: {e}")
        return f"[{device_id}] Error: {e}"

print("=== Stopping XelisV3 TNN Mining (Parallel) ===")

if not devices:
    print("No devices specified in $devices environment variable")
else:
    # Process all devices in parallel
    with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=len(devices)) as executor:
        future_to_device = {executor.submit(stop_mining_on_device, device_id): device_id for device_id in devices}
        for future in as_completed(future_to_device):
            device_id = future_to_device[future]
            try:
                result = future.result()
                print(result)
            except Exception as exc:
                print(f"[{device_id}] Generated an exception: {exc}")
    
    print("XelisV3 TNN mining stopped on all devices.")
minerType.uninstallScript:
import os, time, subprocess
from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor, as_completed

ADB = os.environ.get("adb_path", "adb")
devices = os.environ.get("devices", "").split()

def uninstall_miner_on_device(device_id):
    """Uninstall XelisV3 TNN miner from a single device"""
    try:
        print(f"[{device_id}] Starting XelisV3 TNN miner uninstallation...")
        
        print(f"[{device_id}] Force stopping Termux...")
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell am force-stop com.termux", shell=True)
        time.sleep(1)
        
        print(f"[{device_id}] Launching Termux...")
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell am start -n com.termux/com.termux.app.TermuxActivity", shell=True)
        time.sleep(5)
        
        # Enter proot-distro Ubuntu to remove the miner files
        print(f"[{device_id}] Entering proot-distro Ubuntu...")
        proot_cmd = "proot-distro%slogin%subuntu"
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input text \"{proot_cmd}\"", shell=True)
        time.sleep(1)
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input keyevent 66", shell=True)
        time.sleep(5)  # Wait for proot to initialize
        
        # Remove TNN miner files from home directory
        print(f"[{device_id}] Removing TNN miner files...")
        remove_cmd = "rm%s-rf%s~/tnn-miner*%s~/Tnn-miner*"
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input text \"{remove_cmd}\"", shell=True)
        time.sleep(1)
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input keyevent 66", shell=True)
        time.sleep(2)
        
        # Exit proot
        print(f"[{device_id}] Exiting proot-distro...")
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input text \"exit\"", shell=True)
        time.sleep(1)
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input keyevent 66", shell=True)
        time.sleep(2)
        
        # Optionally remove the entire Ubuntu proot-distro (uncomment if desired)
        # print(f"[{device_id}] Removing Ubuntu proot-distro entirely...")
        # remove_proot_cmd = "proot-distro%sremove%subuntu"
        # subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input text \"{remove_proot_cmd}\"", shell=True)
        # time.sleep(1)
        # subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input keyevent 66", shell=True)
        # time.sleep(3)
        # # Confirm removal with 'y'
        # subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input text \"y\"", shell=True)
        # time.sleep(1)
        # subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input keyevent 66", shell=True)
        # time.sleep(5)
        
        print(f"[{device_id}] XelisV3 TNN miner uninstalled successfully!")
        return f"[{device_id}] Miner uninstalled"
        
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"[{device_id}] Error uninstalling miner: {e}")
        return f"[{device_id}] Error: {e}"

print("=== Uninstalling XelisV3 TNN Miner (Parallel) ===")

if not devices:
    print("No devices specified in $devices environment variable")
else:
    # Process all devices in parallel
    with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=len(devices)) as executor:
        future_to_device = {executor.submit(uninstall_miner_on_device, device_id): device_id for device_id in devices}
        
        for future in as_completed(future_to_device):
            device_id = future_to_device[future]
            try:
                result = future.result()
                print(result)
            except Exception as exc:
                print(f"[{device_id}] Generated an exception: {exc}")
    
    print("XelisV3 TNN miner uninstallation completed on all devices.")
